_comment: Machine-readable manifest of demo/placeholder content shipped with SpeedPy. Used by the /strip-demo skill and PRODUCTION_READY.md checklist. The canonical repo keeps these artifacts as teaching examples; fork owners use this manifest to safely remove them before production.

artifacts.label: Demo app (Product CRUD)
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Delete demoapp/ directory, templates/demoapp/, remove from INSTALLED_APPS, and remove the URL include from project/urls.py.
artifacts.existing_db_notes: Drop the demoapp_product table or write a removal migration before deleting the app code.

artifacts.label: Product API (read-only demo)
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Delete mainapp/api/products.py, remove imports and URL patterns from project/api_urls.py, remove product views from mainapp/api/__init__.py, remove read:products scope from OAUTH2_PROVIDER and SPECTACULAR_SETTINGS in settings.py, remove the products tag from SPECTACULAR_SETTINGS['TAGS'].
artifacts.existing_db_notes: No database changes needed — Product API reads from demoapp.Product.

artifacts.label: Demo job creation endpoint
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove DemoJobCreateView from mainapp/api/jobs.py (keep JobStatusView if using async jobs). Remove the /api/v1/jobs/demo/ URL from project/api_urls.py. Remove the DemoJobCreateView import from api_urls.py.
artifacts.existing_db_notes: No schema changes needed — the endpoint creates AsyncJob rows but the model may be retained.

artifacts.label: Demo background job Celery task
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove run_demo_job from mainapp/tasks/jobs.py (keep the file if adding real tasks). Remove run_demo_job from mainapp/tasks/__init__.py __all__ and import.

artifacts.label: AsyncJob model and status endpoint (reusable infrastructure)
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Keep if your app needs async job tracking (the 202 + status URL pattern). Remove only if you have no background tasks that need status polling. If removing: delete mainapp/models/jobs.py, remove from mainapp/models/__init__.py, remove JobStatusView and its URL, remove read:jobs/write:jobs scopes, remove the jobs tag.
artifacts.existing_db_notes: Removing the AsyncJob model requires a removal migration or database reset.

artifacts.label: Demo product scope in OAuth2 and OpenAPI
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove the read:products entry from both OAUTH2_PROVIDER['SCOPES'] and the oauth2 flows in SPECTACULAR_SETTINGS['APPEND_COMPONENTS'].
artifacts.existing_db_notes: Revoke any OAuth tokens that include read:products before removing the scope.

artifacts.label: DEMO_MODE flag and context processor
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove the DEMO_MODE setting from settings.py, remove demo_mode from context_processors.py, remove 'project.context_processors.demo_mode' from TEMPLATES. Then remove {% if DEMO_MODE %} blocks from templates.

artifacts.label: Demo credentials block on login page
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove the {% if DEMO_MODE %} block that displays admin@example.com / adminadmin credentials.

artifacts.label: Demo App / CRUD Screens section in SpeedPy UI preview
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Remove the 'Demo App / CRUD Screens' section that links to demo_product_list and demo_product_create URLs.

artifacts.label: Placeholder welcome, pricing, and contact pages
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Replace with your own landing page, pricing page, etc. Do not delete without providing replacements — the root URL must resolve.

artifacts.label: Appliku demo deployment config
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Delete appliku_demo.yml. Keep appliku.yml for production deployment.

artifacts.label: Product API references in CLI/MCP examples
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: After removing the Product API, regenerate MCP tools and remove product-specific CLI subcommands and MCP tools. Replace with your own domain resources. The generated_tools.py file should be regenerated from the updated OpenAPI schema.

artifacts.label: Tests that depend on the Product API
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Before removing the Product API or demo job endpoint, move pagination/throttle/request-ID tests to use a non-demo endpoint from your domain. Delete test_api_jobs.py only after removing the demo job. Keep tests that exercise reusable infrastructure (AsyncJob status polling).

artifacts.label: Demo API references in README
artifacts.fresh_clone_notes: Update README to remove /api/v1/products/ and read:products references. Replace with your own domain API examples.
